steps.title: Build & Implement

steps.title: Maintain & Improve

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose a monthly subscription plan that works for you.

items.question: Is my company a good fit for Progmetia?
items.answer: We work with businesses of all sizes that can benefit from AI solutions. We can schedule a free discovery call to assess your processes.

items.question: Are your solutions secure?
items.answer: Yes. All our solutions are built to comply with industry-standard security protocols. Your data is encrypted and your privacy is always protected.

items.question: Do you offer continuous support?
items.answer: Yes. All plans include ongoing support and maintenance. We proactively monitor implemented solutions and intervene when needed.

items.question: How long does it take to implement my requests?
items.answer: It varies by scope. Simple automations are delivered in a few days, while complex LLM or chatbot projects may take a few weeks.

items.question: Can I get more than 3 developers?
items.answer: Yes. For needs beyond the Enterprise plan, contact us and we'll prepare a custom offer for you.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
items.answer: Yes. All plans are flexible and can be cancelled or paused at any time. There is no long-term contract requirement.

footer.description: Taking your business into the future with artificial intelligence.
